author: slnsys
description: Convert a complete Canvas to a long form document, integrating all cards, notes, images and other media content into a single markdown file.

manifest.author: slnsys
manifest.description: Convert a complete Canvas to a long form document, integrating all cards, notes, images and other media content into a single markdown file.
manifest.name: Canvas2Document

name: Canvas2Document

releases.author: slnsys
releases.description:
### Conversion modes - partial canvas
- new partial conversion of canvas by selection or color tags (color tags concept by [jpmoo](https://github.com/jpmoo))
- fix error in Canvas detection when a file-node is selected
releases.name: Conversion modes - partial canvas

releases.author: slnsys
releases.description: Contains some minor fixes and improvements and a new auto overwrite setting for target documents.
releases.name: Fixes, improvements, auto overwrite

releases.author: slnsys
releases.description:
**Improvements**
- support reading embedded YAML frontmatter in MD documents (toggable via settings)
- support reading edge labels in Canvas (toggable via settings)
- added action buttons for the Obsidian ribbon bar
- support conversion of embedded online links like all other media types

**Fixes/Testing**
- verified testing on Linux and MacOS
- optimized display size of embedded media (images, pdf, online links)
- added a settings page
releases.name: Support for Edge labels, YAML frontmatter, Ribbon buttons

releases.author: slnsys
releases.description:
- fixed crash when having special canvas embedding
- added embedding support for more media types: Video, Audio
releases.name: Bugfix Canvas embedding and support for more embedded file types

releases.author: slnsys
releases.description: Fixed: Conversion crashed on special constellations of edges between nodes and groups.
releases.name: Bugfix for handling edges between nodes and groups

releases.author: slnsys
releases.description:
- better filenames and no cluttering of folders: overwriting of files with same name with confirmation
 - better filemanagement in writing temp files
 - added "Step..." prefixes to commands
releases.name: Filesystem clearings

releases.author: slnsys
releases.description:
- Hierarchy reading: brings the canvas hierarchical relations and ordering as TOC-tree to navigate
- Flexibility in Canvas Reading: recognizes multiple areas with multiple tree/graph structures
- Better metadata on navigational headings: data from nodes and files in navigational headers
- Filenames as headings in resultdoc

![image](https://github.com/slnsys/obsidian-canvas2document/assets/161649412/5b582a01-01ec-491d-a9b1-a5f51d33f671)
releases.name: Hierarchy, Ordering, more Metadata for navigation

releases.author: slnsys
releases.description:
**Feature completion**
Conversion now consists of 2 steps: generating a canvas level intermediate document and a cleared target document to continue editing in content level.

**Improvements**
- documentation optimization
- added slim inline documentation in generated process media

**Errors**
- Fixed an error when the canvas files being located in the root of the obsidian vault
- Fixed handling of variations of media filenames
releases.name: Conversion processing

releases.description:
added requested changes from review bot.
plus additional request
releases.name: Initial Release for review
